match.userMessage: Create a concise goal implementation plan for the plan approval e2e test.

arguments.title: E2E Goal Plan
arguments.plan:
## Overview
Use this plan as a persistent goal from the real TUI.

## Steps
1. Render the submitted plan.
2. Select Use as /goal.
3. Start the goal handoff.

## Verification
Confirm the goal handoff starts the canonical goal run.

response.content: Plan goal handoff e2e goal run started.
